creator: sokolhacker@mail.ru
text:
Fix: 

$mv ports/misc/bsdiff sysutils/
$mv ports/misc/xdelta sysutils/

$sed -i /'misc\/bsdiff'/'sysutils\/bsdiff'/ ports/security/freebsd-update/Makefile
$sed -i /'misc\/bsdiff'/'sysutils\/bsdiff'/ ports/sysutils/portsnap/Makefile
How-To-Repeat: It would be more logical to move "misc/bsdiff" and "misc/xdelta" to the sysutils category.
